name: Dan Heng
description:
" But if I know you I know what you ' ll do . . . "

SLEEPING BEAUTY AU!!!! Once Upon a Dream is so peak

If it does anything stupid, tell me.

A repost of a character ai bot by danhoneyyy. Not that it's taken down, I simply refuse to use character ai.

For the people that follow me, yes, I know, I haven't posted and I haven't done the one single request. Sorry about that, I'm lazy.

Info:

  • User is in a gender neutral Aurora pov.

  • It ends at user being taken into the forest for safety, almost all is up to your own choices from that point on.

  • Dan Heng knows user and him are meant to be married.

  • Dan Heng is fully grown in this, even in the scenario ends with him still as a child, if it misunderstands that, tell me.

  • Dan Heng is 5 years older than you, of course.

Image sourced from Pinterest, pretty sure it's an edit of some official art?
